modifications.details: Passed local CLI validation (ecore-validator --validate-structure) on the first attempt with zero syntactic or semantic errors.

modifications.action: Initial ingestion of natural language specification from gate2_input_spec.md
modifications.details: Passed local CLI validation (xmi-validator --validate-semantic --ecore cra.ecore) on the first attempt with all 9 features initially unassigned and correct methodCall/dataAccess cross-references.

Validated structurally and semantically via henshin-validator CLI, but crashed the JRE REST runner during search execution with a java.lang.NullPointerException inside the Henshin interpreter's ReferenceConstraint.check.

Identified missing incoming/outgoing attributes inside NAC conclusions, causing null reference establishment. Successfully patched by adding incoming="_nac_cc_edge" to _nac_cc_feat2 and outgoing="_nac_dc_edge" to _nac_dc_cls2. Resolved the NullPointerException.

Identified that matching target classes by dynamically generated string names caused search deadlocks. Streamlined rules to be parameter-minimal: removed targetClassName strings from LHS/RHS of assignFeature, letting the rule match any existing Class node directly, and utilizing EMF bidirectional opposite references to handle moves/assignments parameter-free.

Passed local structural validation, but when uploaded to the REST container, failed with java.io.IOException: Script not found. Identified that Windows backslash '\' separators in the zip header created by PowerShell Compress-Archive were unresolvable on the Linux container. Corrected by creating an explicit JSZip Node.js packaging script.

Algorithm initialized but crashed NSGA-II selection sorting with java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Comparison method violates its general contract!. Traced to empty class mutations generating a 0/0 division evaluating to NaN inside coupling OCL. Patched by embedding an explicit guard clause: if features->size() = 0.

Tuned parameterValues map to only inject choice variables for featureName (matching the optimized Henshin operators). Scaled search budget (populationSize=200, maxEvaluations=50000) to ensure NSGA-II reliably reaches the mathematical global optimum of +0.85 (the exact equivalent of traditional non-normalized 1.50).
